no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: Parent bead ddx-256af8b5 is already decomposed into four child beads that cover the original contract:
- ddx-468d800f — ADR-conformance lint for mutation resolvers.
- ddx-eb75a32d — Coordinator to client mutation routing envelope.
- ddx-ba31fec8 — Origin identity attestation forwarding plus dual authorization.
- ddx-ea1ada47 — End-to-end integration test with two in-process servers.

No parent-level implementation remains to be done without duplicating or conflicting with the child slices. The correct follow-up is to work the child beads and only close the parent after those complete, or revise the dependency direction in triage if the queue needs different unblock semantics.
